Part.Source:
Do 'OpenDocument'
&Total = 100 &Percentual = 0 &ProgressIni = serverNow() do 'Atualiza'
&SdtTabelaPrecoProduto.Clear() padraoUsuario.Call('L','SEL_WWTabelaPrecoProduto',&PesCod,&EmpCod,&PadObs,&Today) &SdtTabelaPrecoProduto.FromJson(&PadObs)
&CellRow = 2 &FirstColumn = 2 RetornaColunasTabelasNomes.Call(&EmpCod, &TabCod, &TabColNom, &TabColNom2, &TabColNom3,&TabColNom4,&TabColNom5,&TabColNom6,&TabColNom7,&TabColNom8,&TabColNom9)
if &IsPrecificado = true &TabColNom10 = &PedDtaVct.ToFormattedString() EndIf
if &IsOcultarNomesColunas = true &TabColNom = &TabCod + '/1' &TabColNom2 = &TabCod + '/2' &TabColNom3 = &TabCod + '/3' &TabColNom4 = &TabCod + '/4' &TabColNom5 = &TabCod + '/5' &TabColNom6 = &TabCod + '/6' &TabColNom7 = &TabCod + '/7' &TabColNom8 = &TabCod + '/8' &TabColNom9 = &TabCod + '/9' &TabColNom10 = &TabCod + '/Vcto' EndIf
Do 'Cabecalho' Do 'WriteColumnTitles' Do 'WriteData' Do 'CloseDocument'
Sub 'OpenDocument'
&Random = Random() * 10000 &Filename = &UrlFisico
&ExcelDocument.Open(&Filename) Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Clear()
EndSub
Sub 'WriteColumnTitles'
if &IsCodBarras = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Cód.Barras" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
//Ref.Cód &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Ref.Cód." &VisibleColumnCount += 1
//Produto &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Cód.Produto" &VisibleColumnCount += 1
//DESCRIÇÃO PRODUTO &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Descrição Produto" &VisibleColumnCount += 1
if &IsNCM = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "NCM" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
//MARCA &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Marca" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 IF &IsCol1 = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &TabColNom //"Col.1" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf if &IsCol2 = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &TabColNom2 // "Col.2" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf if &IsCol3 = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &TabColNom3 // "Col.3" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf if &IsCol4 = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &TabColNom4 // "Col.4" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf if &IsCol5 = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &TabColNom5 // "Col.5" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf if &IsCol6 = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &TabColNom6 // "Col.6" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf if &IsCol7 = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &TabColNom7 // "Col.7" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf if &IsCol8 = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &TabColNom8 // "Col.8" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf if &IsCol9 = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &TabColNom9 // "Col.9" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
if &IsPrecificado = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &TabColNom10 // "Col.10" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
if &IsImposto = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = 'IMPOSTO' &VisibleColumnCount += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = 'R$ TOTAL' &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &IsLocacao = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Locação" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf if &IsSaldoEstoque = true //Estoque &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Estoque" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 //Saldo &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Saldo" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf if &IsPesoVolEmb = true //Peso &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Peso" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 //Emb/Vol. &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Emb/Vol" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf // if &IsImagem = true // &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True // &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Imagem Produto" // &VisibleColumnCount += 1 // EndIf if &IsProVlrCus = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "R$ CUSTO" &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
EndSub
//Sub 'GetImagem' // &ProImg180.FromImage(produto_sem_imagem) // For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProImgCod // Where EmpCod = &EmpCod // Where ProCod = &ProCod // WHere ProImgPri = true // &ProImg180 = ProImg325 // Exit // EndFor //EndSub
Sub 'WriteData'
&countSdt = &sdtTabelaPrecoProduto.Count Do case case &countSdt >= 10000 &numeric = 400 &AuxNumeric = 4 case &countSdt >= 3000 &numeric = 300 &AuxNumeric = 4 case &countSdt >= 800 &numeric = 80 //para não fazer tantas atualizações no progresso (desnecessário) &AuxNumeric = 5 case &countSdt >= 400 &numeric = 40 &AuxNumeric = 5 case &countSdt >= 100 &numeric = 15 &AuxNumeric = 5 otherwise //menos que 100 &numeric = 10 &AuxNumeric = 10 EndCase
&SdtTabelaPreco.Clear() For &SdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem in &SdtTabelaPrecoProduto
For each order EmpCod, TabCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, TabAltCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod where ProCod = &SdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem.C where ProGraCod = &SdtTabelaPrecoProdutoItem.G
&sdtTabelaPrecoItem = new() &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.ProCod = ProCod &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.ProNom = ProNom &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.ProGraCod = ProGraCod &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.ProGraRefPadL = ProGraRefPadL &sdtTabelaPreco.Add(&sdtTabelaPrecoItem) exit EndFor
EndFor If &Ordem = 1 //Cód. Produto &SdtTabelaPreco.Sort("ProGraRefPadL") else &SdtTabelaPreco.Sort("ProNom") EndIf
For &SdtTabelaPrecoItem in &SdtTabelaPreco &auxCount += 1 if &auxCount = &numeric &CountPercent += &AuxNumeric &Percentual = &CountPercent If &Percentual >= 100 &Percentual = 99 EndIf do 'Atualiza' &auxCount = 0 Endif
For each order EmpCod,TabCod,ProCod,ProGraCod,TabAltCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod where ProCod = &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.ProCod where ProGraCod = &sdtTabelaPrecoItem.ProGraCod where TabCod = &TabCod where TabAltCod = TabUltAlt
&ProCod = ProCod &ProGraCod = ProGraCod
&CellRow += 1 &VisibleColumnCount = 0 if &IsCodBarras = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = ProGraBar &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
//'Ref.Cód.' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = ProGraRef &VisibleColumnCount += 1
//'Produto' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = ProCod &VisibleColumnCount += 1
//'Descrição Produto' &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = ProNomGra &VisibleColumnCount += 1
//Marca &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = MarNom &VisibleColumnCount += 1
if &IsNCM = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = NcmCod &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &IsCol1 = true if &Isimposto = true &TabPrc = TabPrc1 EndIf &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = TabPrc1 &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &IsCol2 = true if &Isimposto = true &TabPrc = TabPrc2 EndIf &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = TabPrc2 &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &IsCol3 = true if &Isimposto = true &TabPrc = TabPrc3 EndIf &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = TabPrc3 &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &IsCol4 = true if &Isimposto = true &TabPrc = TabPrc4 EndIf &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = TabPrc4 &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &IsCol5 = true if &Isimposto = true &TabPrc = TabPrc5 EndIf &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = TabPrc5 &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &IsCol6 = true if &Isimposto = true &TabPrc = TabPrc6 EndIf &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = TabPrc6 &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &IsCol7 = true if &Isimposto = true &TabPrc = TabPrc7 EndIf &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = TabPrc7 &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &IsCol8 = true if &Isimposto = true &TabPrc = TabPrc8 EndIf &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = TabPrc8 &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf If &IsCol9 = true if &Isimposto = true &TabPrc = TabPrc9 EndIf &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = TabPrc9 &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
If &IsPrecificado = true if &Isimposto = true &TabPrc = TabPrc1 EndIf
&TabPrcPrecificado = TabPrc1
if (TabPerAcr > 0 or TabPerAnt > 0) and (TabIsAntAcr = true) and (not &PedDtaVct.IsEmpty() and TabDtaVct <> &PedDtaVct) retornaUnitarioLiquidoAntecipado.Call(TabPerAcr, TabPerAnt, TabDtaVct,&DataVazia, &PedDtaVct, &TabPrcPrecificado) Endif &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = &TabPrcPrecificado &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
If &IsImposto = true &AuxProCod = ProCod Do 'DadosImposto' RetornaTotalImposto.Call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,0,ProCod,&FilBasImp,&LctBasImpCod,&PesCidUfeCod,&PesGruImpCod,&ProCatCod,&TabPrc,1,&TpcVlr,false,&Moeda, &IsImpostoCadastrado) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = &Moeda //Valor imposto &VisibleColumnCount += 1 if not &TabPrc.IsEmpty() &Moeda += &TabPrc //Calcula valor + valor imposto EndIf &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = &Moeda //Valor Total &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
&EstQtd.SetEmpty() &EstLoc.SetEmpty() &EstSdo.SetEmpty()
if &IsLocacao = true or &IsSaldoEstoque = true do 'GetEstoque'
If &IsLocacao = true &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &EstLoc &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf
If &IsSaldoEstoque = true //Estoque &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = &EstQtd &VisibleColumnCount += 1 //Saldo &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = &EstSdo &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf Endif
If &IsPesoVolEmb = true //Peso &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = ProPesLiqPrd &VisibleColumnCount += 1 //Emb/Vol. &VolumeEmbalagem = 'EMB:' + trim(toformattedString(ProQtdEmb)) + ' / VOL:' + trim(toformattedString(ProQtdVol)) &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &VolumeEmbalagem &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf // Do 'GetImagem' // &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Type = "U" // &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = &ProImg180 // &VisibleColumnCount += 1
if &IsProVlrCus = true //Valor custo &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Number = ProVlrCus &VisibleColumnCount += 1 EndIf exit Endfor EndFor
&Percentual = 100 &ProgressFin = serverNow() do 'Atualiza'
EndSub
Sub 'GetEstoque'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &EstQtd = EstQtd &EstLoc = EstLoc &EstSdo = EstSdo Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'CloseDocument'
&ExcelDocument.Save() Do 'CheckStatus' &ExcelDocument.Close()
EndSub
Sub 'CheckStatus'
If (&ExcelDocument.ErrCode <> 0) &Filename = "" &ErrorMessage = &ExcelDocument.ErrDescription &ExcelDocument.Close() Return EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'Atualiza' for each Order ProgressId where ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini When none new ProgressId = &ProgressId ProgressValue = &Percentual ProgressFin = &ProgressFin ProgressIni = &Progressini Endnew Endfor
commit EndSub
Sub 'Cabecalho'
&Title = "Tabela de Preços" &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &Title // B2 &VisibleColumnCount += 3 //pula 3 colunas &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = "Tabela: " + &TabCod &CellRow += 1 //proxima linha
&PesEml.SetEmpty() For each order EmpCod,PesCod,PesEmlCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod where PesCod = &PesCod &PesRaz = gxGetMLi(PesRaz,1,50) &PesEml = ' EMAIL: ' + Trim(PesEml) exit EndFor
if &PesEml.IsEmpty() RetornaFilialFaturamento.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FilRaz, &FiLCidNom, &FilLog, &Contato, &Contato2, &FilImg_LogRel, &FilFan) else For each order EmpCod,FilCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod where FilCod = &FilCod &FilFan = FilFan &FilRaz = FilRaz &FiLCidNom = FilCidNom.Trim() + ' - ' + trim(FilCidUfeCod) &FilLog = 'END: ' + trim(FilLog) + ', ' + trim(FilNro) + ' - ' + trim(FilBai) &FilCidNom = 'CIDADE: ' + trim(FilCidNom) + ' - ' + trim(FilCidUfeCod) + ' CEP: ' + trim(FilCep) If not FilCpj.IsEmpty() &Contato = 'CNPJ: '+ trim(FilCpj) EndIF If not FilFonNum.IsEmpty() &Contato2 = 'FONE: ' + trim(FilFonNum) + ' ' + &PesEml //Para pegar o email do vendedor no cabecalho EndIf // if FilImg_LogRel.IsEmpty() // &FilImg_LogRel.FromImage(FilialSemImagem) // Else // &FilImg_LogRel = FilImg_LogRel // EndIF
exit EndFor EndIf &VisibleColumnCount = 0 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &FilRaz &CellRow += 1 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Bold = True &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Color = 11 &ExcelDocument.Cells(&CellRow, &FirstColumn + &VisibleColumnCount).Text = &Contato2
if &PesRaz.IsEmpty() &PesRaz = 'NÃO DEFINIDO' EndIf
&CellRow +=1 //Pulas prox linha &CellRow +=1 //linha em branco p/ imprimir os titulos &VisibleColumnCount = 0 //para imprimir os titulos
EndSub
Sub 'DadosImposto'
For each order EmpCod, PesCod //Pessoa/Cliente where EmpCod = &EmpCod where PesCod = &CliCod &PesCidUfeCod = PesCidUfeCod &PesGruImpCod = PesGruImpCod &TpcVlr = TpcVlr exit EndFor
For each order EmpCod, FilCod //Filial where EmpCod = &EmpCod where FilCod = &FilCod &FilBasImp = FilBasImp exit EndFor
For each order EmpCod,LctCod //Tipo Lancamento where EmpCod = &EmpCod where LctCod = &LctCod &LctBasImpCod = LctBasImpCod exit EndFor
For each order EmpCod,ProCod where EmpCod = &EmpCod where ProCod = &AuxProCod &ProCatCod = ProCatCod exit EndFor
EndSub
